question: Assuming today is Wednesday of the current week, what is the approximate average number of website visits for the entire week?

options.A: About 18 visits, computed from all seven days shown
options.B: Unable to calculate, because data for the full week are not available
options.C: About 41 visits, using only days with non-zero values
options.D: About 30 visits, since the values appear to cluster around this level

explanation: The chart only shows measured values for the first part of the week; the remaining days are effectively missing, but are drawn as zero-height bars. Computing an average across all seven days (including those zeros) assumes the missing days truly had zero values, which is not supported by the data. Therefore the weekly average cannot be reliably calculated.
